title: Research Workflow: Researcher -> Extractor -> Fact-checker -> Writer
command:
pip install handoffkit
handoffkit init research-workflow
cd research-workflow
python research_workflow.py
handoffkit report runs/latest
pain: Research agents often blur sources, confidence, corrections, and final writing constraints.
free_text_summary: Sources look good. Fact checker removed something. Writer can make the brief.

handoffs.task: Produce a sourced brief on Python packaging release trust.
handoffs.summary: Collect evidence on Trusted Publishing, manual token uploads, and release provenance.
decisions: Treat official packaging docs as primary sources.
Separate TestPyPI validation from PyPI production release.
Track claims that need verification before writing.
errors: One blog post was outdated and excluded from source list.
next_steps: Capture source URLs for each claim

handoffs.task: Produce a sourced brief on Python packaging release trust.
handoffs.summary: Extracted 7 claims and mapped each to a source URL and confidence level.
decisions: Mark OIDC token exchange as high confidence.
Mark adoption preference as opinion unless sourced.
Keep manual twine upload factual but not inherently negative.
errors: One claim mixed PyPI and TestPyPI behavior; split into two claims.
next_steps: Check claim wording against source text

handoffs.task: Produce a sourced brief on Python packaging release trust.
handoffs.summary: Fact-check passed after removing one unsupported sentence about ecosystem preference.
decisions: Keep recommendation: prefer Trusted Publishing for new packages.
Avoid saying manual twine upload is insecure by itself.
Mention replayable release evidence as operational benefit.
errors: Unsupported preference claim removed from final outline.
next_steps: Add final caveat about package owner configuration

trace.name: Research Workflow: Researcher -> Extractor -> Fact-checker -> Writer
trace.final_output: Fact-check passed after removing one unsupported sentence about ecosystem preference.
